title: Orthellin (disambiguation)
content:
'''Orthellin''' may refer to one of the following:

*The '''[[Orthellin system/Legends|Orthellin system]]'''
*The '''[[Orthellin royal mistress/Legends|Orthellin royal mistress]]''', the former owner of the [[Lady Luck/Legends|''Lady Luck'']]

{{Disambig}}
